center.name: 马斯克林群岛
center.summary: 马斯克林群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括马岛原燕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Bonaparte, 1850. | range_map = Phedinaborbonica.png | range_map_alt = Map showing the breeding areas in Africa | range_map_caption = Approximate range in Africa }} The Mascarene martin or Mascarene swallow (Phedina borbonica) is a passerine bird in the swallow family that breeds in Madagascar and in the Mascarene Islands
